title: Fix Google Client ID configuration error

requirements.text: Resolve the 'Google Client ID not configured' error that prevents users from connecting their Google Account. The error message states 'Please set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable.' Ensure the environment variable is properly configured and accessible to the frontend application.

quotes: Google Client ID not configured. Please set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable.

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Connect Google Account' button functions without showing the configuration error
The VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable is properly loaded and accessible
Users can successfully initiate the Google OAuth flow

requirements.text: Verify that the Google OAuth connection flow works end-to-end after the Client ID is configured, allowing users to successfully connect their Google/YouTube accounts and post clips.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can complete the Google OAuth authorization flow
Connected Google accounts display correctly in the UI
Users can successfully post video clips to YouTube after connecting

constraints: Do not modify the backend OAuth flow logic
Preserve the existing ChannelConnection component structure
nonGoals: Modifying the YouTube API integration beyond fixing the Client ID issue
